name: movecertificate

scripts.build: rm -rf ../webroot dist && mkdir -p ../webroot && parcel build index.html && cp -r dist/* ../webroot/ && rm -rf dist && for f in ../webroot/*.js; do javascript-obfuscator "$f" --output "$f" --compact true; done
scripts.obfuscate: for f in ../webroot/*.js; do javascript-obfuscator "$f" --output "$f" --compact true; done
scripts.build_push: rm -rf ../webroot dist && mkdir -p ../webroot && parcel build index.html && cp -r dist/* ../webroot/ && rm -rf dist && for f in ../webroot/*.js; do javascript-obfuscator "$f" --output "$f" --compact true; done && scp ../webroot/*  root@192.168.1.4:/data/adb/modules/MoveCertificate/webroot/

author: iyue
description: The MoveCertificate web page is used to display and delete certificates.
